game_name: Super Street Fighter II: The New Challengers

audio_identity.overall_style: Fighting game arcade soundtrack with remade music and sound effects
distinctive_elements: New announcer with character voice samples
Remade music and sound effects from original Street Fighter II

us_version.strings: Sound like ensemble rather than individuals
differences: Blanka theme: strings an octave lower
M. Bison theme: original key preserved
Fei Long theme: original key (vs half-step lower in Japanese)
us_version.reason: Includes announcer voice clips for all 16 playable characters

differences: Fei Long theme: pitched half-step lower
